brief: Astronomers discover an atmosphere on a nearby Earthlike planet, boosting the search for life. Linus Torvalds dismisses critics of AI in Linux, while Texas faces historic flooding. Research explores AI adoption in public agencies and academic networking in precarious transitions.
news_summary: Key news includes the first detection of an atmosphere on a potentially habitable exoplanet, Linus Torvalds' defiant stance on AI in Linux, and devastating floods in central Texas.
papers_summary: Papers examine Generative AI adoption in a state DOT, bot integration in open-source projects, and academic networking during career transitions.

en.brief: Astronomers discover an atmosphere on a nearby Earthlike planet, boosting the search for life. Linus Torvalds dismisses critics of AI in Linux, while Texas faces historic flooding. Research explores AI adoption in public agencies and academic networking in precarious transitions.
en.news_summary: Key news includes the first detection of an atmosphere on a potentially habitable exoplanet, Linus Torvalds' defiant stance on AI in Linux, and devastating floods in central Texas.
en.papers_summary: Papers examine Generative AI adoption in a state DOT, bot integration in open-source projects, and academic networking during career transitions.

zh.brief: 今日新聞涵蓋地緣政治轉變、監管失靈與社交媒體正義；研究論文探討AI團隊動態與學術網絡。
zh.news_summary: 皮尤調查顯示全球對中國好感度超越美國；曼谷大火凸顯泰國監管漏洞；台灣政治受難者後代追尋真相；香港國安法搜查獨立書店。
zh.papers_summary: 跨領域研究關注學術網絡中的流動與不穩定性、AI在公共機構的採用，以及低資源語言中的錯誤訊息檢測。

todays_image.caption: The Froebel's emphasis on nurturing growth through structured play mirrors astronomers' discovery of an atmosphere that could sustain life on a nearby Earthlike planet.
todays_image.title: The Froebel
